Name: Sphynx
Area: Aphrike, Castle in the Clouds, Pyramid

Name: Kelpie
Area: Ocean Space next to Groat and Casino Cave

Name: Demon's Guard
Notes: See its page for a break down of stats

Name: Rico Jr.
Area: Forced encounter during Chapter 4 of Story Mode in Casino Cave, afterwards (or in Normal Mode and Batle Royale) randomly on Empty Spaces; higher chance to appear in the Underworld and Dark Castle
Notes: Rico Jr.'s stats are equal to the average of all players' stats.

Name: Comacho
Area: Coliseum during Green Jr. Coliseum Battle.
Notes: Comacho's Stats are equal to 1.5 times the highest stats of all players.

Name: Wabbit
Area: Everywhere during Wabbit Explosion, a random dungeon during a King's favor.
Notes: Wabbit's Stats are equal to the lowest stats of all players.

Name: Wallace
Notes: Wallace's stats are equal to the average of all players' stats.

Name: Chimpy
Notes: Chimpy's Speed Stat is equal to 3 times the SP stat of the fastest player.

Name: Robo-Sassin
Area: Randomly everywhere when the Robo-Sassin has been hired to kill the player.
Notes: Robo-Sassin's Stats are equal to 1.5 times the highest stats of all players.
